channel.title: AI-Augmented on Youssef Ben Salem
channel.description: Recent content in AI-Augmented on Youssef Ben Salem

item.title: Bravvo: AI-Augmented Enterprise Platform
item.description: Driving ESG Impact Through Employee Engagement: Bravvo V2 is the ultimate employee engagement and sustainability platform. It transforms corporate ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) goals into actionable, daily habits. By leveraging gamification and intelligent challenges, Bravvo empowers employees to act, learn, and contribute to real-world impact in just 10 minutes a day.
